replenishment_policy.instruction: If fewer than minimum_todo_tasks remain, generate new tasks from: 1) docs/game_design.md AI system, 2) unimplemented ball types, 3) missing AI behaviors, 4) game modes, 5) arenas, 6) skills. Focus on AI improvements first.

autonomous_loop_policy.selection_rule: Choose the first todo task. Prioritize AI-related tasks.
autonomous_loop_policy.anti_stall_rule: Never ask user what to do. Generate tasks from game_design.md AI system.
autonomous_loop_policy.failure_rule: If CI fails, fix before new features.
autonomous_loop_policy.idea_generation: After completing a task, read docs/game_design.md AI section and suggest 2-3 new AI tasks.

tasks.title: Improve Web Visualizer (index.html)
tasks.description: The user requested improvements to visualizer/index.html. We need to add better UI controls (pause/play, timeline slider, speed control), show the winner clearly, fix any bugs, improve the rendering quality (e.g. better shadows, text showing ball HP or class), and make it fully responsive. Ensure all JS is clean and robust.

tasks.title: Implement Ball Brain architecture
tasks.description: Create the core AI system: BallBrain class with 4 layers: Perception (find enemies/allies/boosters), Emotion (fear/rage/greed based on HP and situation), Decision (choose strategy), Action (execute behavior). Each ball gets its own Brain instance.
acceptance: Each ball has its own Brain instance
Brain processes perception -> emotion -> decision -> action
Basic decisions work: chase, flee, attack

tasks.title: Implement Perception system
tasks.description: Create Perception class that scans the world: finds nearby enemies, allies, boosters, traps. Calculates distances, threat levels, opportunity scores. Each ball has perception radius based on type.
acceptance: Perception finds all entities in radius
Perception radius varies by ball type

tasks.title: Implement Emotion system
tasks.description: Create Emotion class that models ball's emotional state: Fear (low HP), Rage (ally killed), Greed (sees booster), Cowardice (first hit), Heroism (ally in danger), Bloodlust (killed 2+ enemies). Emotions modify behavior.
acceptance: Emotions trigger based on correct conditions
Emotions modify behavior (fear = flee, rage = attack)

tasks.title: Implement Decision system
tasks.description: Create Decision class that evaluates options and chooses action: weighs threat level, opportunity, personality, emotional state. Returns best action: chase, flee, attack, use skill, collect booster, defend.
acceptance: Decisions are deterministic given same state

tasks.title: Implement Action execution system
tasks.description: Create Action class that executes chosen behavior: move to target, attack, use skill, flee, collect booster. Handles pathfinding, timing, and cooldowns.

tasks.title: Implement Personality system
tasks.description: Create Personality class that defines ball's character: aggressive, cautious, supportive, reckless, cunning. Each ball type has default personality. Personality influences decision weights.

tasks.title: Implement Chase behavior
tasks.description: Ball moves towards nearest enemy. Uses pathfinding to avoid obstacles. Stops when in attack range. Can be modified by fear (runs away) or greed (chases booster instead).
acceptance: Can be interrupted by higher priority

tasks.title: Implement Flee behavior
tasks.description: Ball moves away from nearest threat. Prioritizes moving towards allies or safe zones. Speed boost when fleeing. Can stop when safe.

tasks.title: Implement Attack behavior
tasks.description: Ball attacks when in range. Timing varies by ball type (fast for Scout, slow for Tank). Can chain attacks. Uses skill when available and optimal.

tasks.title: Implement Kite behavior
tasks.description: Ball maintains distance from enemy while attacking. Moves back when enemy approaches, attacks when enemy retreats. Used by Sniper and ranged types.

tasks.title: Implement Flank behavior
tasks.description: Ball moves behind enemy for bonus damage. Uses stealth (Ninja) or speed (Scout) to get behind. Attacks from behind for critical hit.

tasks.title: Implement Group Attack behavior
tasks.description: Multiple balls coordinate to attack same target. Balls signal intent and converge. Tank takes aggro, damage dealers attack, healer supports.

tasks.title: Implement Collect Booster behavior
tasks.description: Ball moves towards nearest booster. Ignores enemies when collecting (greed). Can be interrupted if enemy gets too close.

tasks.title: Implement Warrior AI profile
tasks.description: Warrior AI: aggressive personality, high attack priority, never flees, uses Wave Attack when 2+ enemies in front, charges into battle.
acceptance: Never flees even at low HP
Has unique battle cry on kill

tasks.title: Implement Scout AI profile
tasks.description: Scout AI: curious personality, seeks boosters, attacks weak enemies, flees from strong ones, uses Dash to escape or chase.

tasks.title: Implement Tank AI profile
tasks.description: Tank AI: brave personality, protects allies, uses Shield when taking damage, body blocks for healers, draws aggro.

tasks.title: Implement Healer AI profile
tasks.description: Healer AI: caring personality, follows wounded allies, heals them, avoids combat, uses heal on cooldown.

tasks.title: Implement Sniper AI profile
tasks.description: Sniper AI: cautious personality, maintains distance, uses Snipe from max range, kites enemies, avoids melee.

tasks.title: Implement Bomber AI profile
tasks.description: Bomber AI: reckless personality, seeks crowded enemy groups, uses Bomb when 3+ enemies nearby, suicide attacks.

tasks.title: Implement Ninja AI profile
tasks.description: Ninja AI: cunning personality, uses Stealth to approach, attacks from behind for critical, flees after attack, hit-and-run tactics.

tasks.title: Implement King AI profile
tasks.description: King AI: leader personality, stays behind allies, uses Command to buff team, targets low HP allies to boost, avoids direct combat.

tasks.title: Implement AI difficulty levels
tasks.description: Create difficulty system: Easy (slow reactions, simple decisions), Medium (normal), Hard (fast, optimal), Chaos (random, funny). Affects reaction time, decision quality, skill usage.
acceptance: Difficulty can be set per ball or globally

tasks.title: Implement Team coordination AI
tasks.description: Balls in same team share information: call out targets, request help, coordinate attacks. Tank signals to hold position, Healer calls for wounded, Sniper calls out threats.
acceptance: Call for help when low HP

tasks.description: Create PERCEPTION skill: Восприятие

tasks.title: Implement EMOTION skill
tasks.description: Create EMOTION skill: Эмоции

tasks.description: Create DECISION skill: Решение

tasks.title: Implement ACTION skill
tasks.description: Create ACTION skill: Действие

tasks.description: Create **Target Strong** — атакует самого сильного skill: для Tank

tasks.title: Implement **Kite** — держит дистанцию, атакует при приближении skill
tasks.description: Create **Kite** — держит дистанцию, атакует при приближении skill: для Sniper

tasks.title: Implement **Flank** — обходит сзади для удара skill
tasks.description: Create **Flank** — обходит сзади для удара skill: для Ninja

tasks.title: Implement Spectator Mode (Наблюдатель) game mode
tasks.description: Create Spectator Mode (Наблюдатель) with full rules and mechanics

tasks.title: Implement Coach Mode (Тренер) game mode
tasks.description: Create Coach Mode (Тренер) with full rules and mechanics

tasks.title: Ball brain architecture (perception, emotion, decision, action)
tasks.description: Implement Ball brain architecture (perception, emotion, decision, action) as described in game_design.md
acceptance: Ball brain architecture (perception, emotion, decision, action) implemented

tasks.title: Basic AI behaviors (chase, flee, attack)
tasks.description: Implement Basic AI behaviors (chase, flee, attack) as described in game_design.md
acceptance: Basic AI behaviors (chase, flee, attack) implemented

tasks.title: 4 ball types with unique AI
tasks.description: Implement 4 ball types with unique AI as described in game_design.md
acceptance: 4 ball types with unique AI implemented

tasks.title: Battle Royale mode with 20 balls
tasks.description: Implement Battle Royale mode with 20 balls as described in game_design.md
acceptance: Battle Royale mode with 20 balls implemented

tasks.title: Basic arena
tasks.description: Implement Basic arena as described in game_design.md

tasks.title: Implement Neural Network module for learning
tasks.description: Create a simple neural network that allows balls to learn from their successes (kills, survival time) and failures over multiple rounds. The weights should adjust dynamically to improve decision making.

tasks.title: Add shrinking battle zone logic
tasks.description: Implement a battle royale shrinking zone (like in PUBG/Fortnite). The safe area should decrease over time, and any ball outside the zone takes continuous damage.
acceptance: Balls take damage outside the zone
AI tries to move toward the safe zone

tasks.title: Create Swarm intelligence boid rules
tasks.description: Implement boid rules (separation, alignment, cohesion) for the swarm ball type. This will make swarm balls group together and move dynamically like a flock of birds.
acceptance: Swarm balls maintain reasonable distance from each other
Swarm balls align their movement directions

tasks.title: Create Procedural Arenas arena
tasks.description: Implement Procedural Arenas with unique mechanics

tasks.title: Implement **Ball Genetics** — Balls reproduce after surviving N battles. Offspring inherit traits skill
tasks.description: Create **Ball Genetics** — Balls reproduce after surviving N battles. Offspring inherit traits skill: speed, damage, color

tasks.title: Implement **Neural Ball** — A ball controlled by a simple neural network skill
tasks.description: Create **Neural Ball** — A ball controlled by a simple neural network skill: numpy, no external libs

tasks.title: Implement **Ball Relationships** — Balls remember each other. Rivalry skill
tasks.description: Create **Ball Relationships** — Balls remember each other. Rivalry skill: attacked me before → attack on sight

tasks.title: Add particle effects for skills
tasks.description: Create basic particle effects in Godot for when balls use their skills like Wave Attack or Explosion.

tasks.title: Implement Kill Feed UI
tasks.description: Create a UI kill feed that logs which ball killed which, using the battle simulation kill_log data.

tasks.title: Add procedural hazards to arena
tasks.description: Generate random hazards (spikes, lava) in the arena that damage balls when they collide.

tasks.title: Implement Neural Network learning logic (Phase 2)
tasks.description: Refine the previously designed neural network learning module for balls by testing with actual battle simulation data over multiple generations.
acceptance: Neural network can ingest battle results

tasks.title: Add Physics Chain Reactions
tasks.description: Make it so balls bouncing off walls or enemies can trigger a ripple effect, pushing other balls into hazards or causing extra damage based on speed.

tasks.title: Add AI Battle Commentator
tasks.description: Create a module that parses the kill_log and actions performed during a simulation to produce exciting, dynamic text commentary of the battle.
acceptance: Commentator module successfully generated commentary based on kill_log

tasks.title: Implement NeuralNetworkBrain wrapper
tasks.description: Create a wrapper for Neural Network that plugs directly into BallBrain architecture (replacing Decision layer) to evaluate its performance against the standard Decision logic.
acceptance: NeuralNetworkBrain can be swapped in for BallBrain

tasks.title: Implement Meta Evolution phase between battles
tasks.description: Create a system where balls have a development phase between battles to upgrade stats (speed, damage, max hp) based on their survival and kills.

tasks.title: Implement Emotional Contagion Logic
tasks.description: Update Emotion layer so fear and aggression spread like a virus. If a ball flees, nearby balls have a chance to enter cowardice/fear state.
acceptance: Chain reactions of fear or aggression work

tasks.title: Add Particle VFX for Ball Skills
tasks.description: Implement Godot Particle2D nodes that trigger when a ball uses its special skill, such as wave attack or explosion.
acceptance: Particle effect plays when skill is used

tasks.title: Evaluate NeuralNetworkBrain performance
tasks.description: Run the NeuralNetworkBrain (Phase 2) alongside the standard BallBrain in simulate_battle.py to evaluate learning efficiency over 500 battles.
acceptance: Simulation successfully tracks neural network performance
Neural brain wins at least 40% of its encounters against standard AI

tasks.title: Add procedural multi-room arenas
tasks.description: Expand the arena generation algorithm to create multi-room maps connected by corridors, rather than a single large open space.
acceptance: Multiple rooms are connected via corridors

tasks.title: Implement visual effects for all ball skills in HTML5 Canvas
tasks.description: Enhance visualizer/index.html to draw unique particle animations and visual elements when balls trigger specific skills (e.g. Shield draws a glowing cyan circle around the tank, Wave Attack draws red shockwaves, Dash leaves ghost trail particles).
acceptance: Visual effects are rendered for all 12 class skills
Effects match the duration of the skill or vanish cleanly
No memory leaks on HTML5 Canvas over long replays

tasks.title: Add interactive inspection mode to Visualizer
tasks.description: Allow clicking on any ball during playback to highlight it, display its active state, current health, target enemy, and emotional level in a detailed inspector panel on the page.
acceptance: Clicking a ball selects and highlights it
Highlighted ball displays detailed real-time telemetry in sidebar
Deselect works by clicking on empty space

tasks.title: Balance: Buff underpowered 'assassin'
tasks.description: The 'assassin' class is winning only 0.0% of the time (expected ~8.3%). It is severely underpowered. Please increase its survivability, damage, speed, or decrease skill cooldown.

tasks.title: Sync GDScript: Implement 'calc_dist' in perception.gd
tasks.description: The Python class in perception.py implements 'calc_dist', but the GDScript counterpart perception.gd is missing it. Please implement the same logic in GDScript.

tasks.title: Innovation: Implement Neural Network Perceptron AI
tasks.description: Replace the hardcoded if-else logic in src/ai/decision.py and src/ai/decision.gd with a simple Perceptron/Weights Matrix. Create a file ai_weights.json to store the weights. The decision layer should calculate the score for each action by multiplying perception inputs with the weights.
